sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4048" key="a)leurodou=ntes" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλευροδοῦντες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, kind of <sense id="n4048.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wheaten cakes</tr_>, dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1140.tlg001:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anticl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
